text:
Dressing Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's usual performance in their ability to dress and undress below the waist, including fasteners, excluding footwear, at the time of admission. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's usual performance in their ability to dress and undress below the waist, including fasteners, excluding footwear, at the time of admission. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 =
